understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 puzzle level by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' was occupied by a selectable simultaneously, progressing level by level until the game reported WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece one 3-pixel cell at a time in the chosen direction, unless blocked by walls or other objects; some adjacent objects were pushable blocks that could be pushed if there was space, while walls acted as impassable barriers (with some boundary behaviors needing experimentation). When multiple selectables existed, CLICK on a selectable's exact pixel position switched control to that piece, changing which one responded to subsequent MOVE actions.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete each KA59 puzzle level by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked with a '+' was occupied by a selectable simultaneously, progressing level by level until the game reported WIN.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shifted the currently selected piece one 3-pixel cell at a time in the chosen direction, unless blocked by walls or other objects; some adjacent objects were pushable blocks that could be pushed if there was space, while walls acted as impassable barriers (with some boundary behaviors needing experimentation). When multiple selectables existed, CLICK on a selectable's exact pixel position switched control to that piece, changing which one responded to subsequent MOVE actions.
